title: Opendoor Technologies Inc Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary
text: Opendoor Technologies Inc Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary. During the Q1 2026 earnings call on May 7, management highlighted several key themes. CEO Kaz Nejatian emphasized the importance of operational velocity and execution, characterizing speed as both a competitive advantage and a moral imperative. The company reported adjusted EBITDA profitability on a 12-month go-forward basis as of April 1, representing a significant operational milestone. Management projected Q2 2026 adjusted EBITDA breakeven, with contribution margins expected to fall in the middle of the 5-7% target range. Recent home acquisition cohorts showed substantially improved unit economics, with October 2025 and January 2026 cohorts demonstrating the best combination of margin stability and resale velocity in company history.
